items.title: GSR Launches Actively Managed Bitcoin, Ethereum and Solana Basket ETF on Nasdaq
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of a Solana-inclusive ETF on Nasdaq could enhance institutional interest and liquidity in SOL, potentially boosting its market presence.

items.title: Noah x Jupiter x Solana: Powering Sovereign Payroll
items.whyYouShouldCare: The collaboration between Noah, Jupiter, and Solana for payroll solutions highlights Solana's growing utility in real-world applications, which may drive ecosystem adoption.

items.title: Crypto giant GSR launches its first ETF to give investors an easy way to bet on the big 3 tokens
items.whyYouShouldCare: GSR's ETF launch focusing on major cryptocurrencies, including Solana, signals increased mainstream acceptance and could attract new investors to the SOL market.
